# MuleSoft Amazon SNS Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (4.8) of Amazon SNS Connector documentation.
> See [Amazon SNS Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sns-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Amazon SNS Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Amazon SNS 4.8 Additional Configuration Information](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sns-connector/latest/amazon-sns-connector-config-topics.md)
- [Amazon SNS 4.8 Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sns-connector/latest/amazon-sns-connector-examples.md)
- [Amazon SNS 4.8 Connector Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sns-connector/latest/amazon-sns-connector-reference.md)
- [Amazon SNS 4.8 Studio Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sns-connector/latest/amazon-sns-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Amazon SNS Connector to Version 4.8](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sns-connector/latest/amazon-sns-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Amazon SNS 4.8 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sns-connector/latest/amazon-sns-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Amazon SNS Connector 4.8 - Get Started](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sns-connector/latest/index.md)
